description.en: Lightweight, connectionless transport with no delivery guarantee. Used by DNS, DHCP, video streaming, online gaming and other latency-sensitive applications.
description.zh: 轻量级、无连接的传输协议，不保证可靠交付。DNS、DHCP、视频流、在线游戏等对延迟敏感的应用使用UDP。

srcPort.en: Source port number, 0 if not used

length.en: Total length in bytes, including header (min 8)
length.zh: 总长度（字节），包含头部 (最小8)

checksum.en: Checksum of header and data, optional in IPv4
checksum.zh: 头部和数据的校验和，在IPv4中可选
